name: health-monitor-mcp
description: Monitor MCP, CI, and HTTP targets with health history, TLS expiry, assertions, and diagnostics

HEALTH_MONITOR_DB.description: Custom path for the SQLite database (optional)

HEALTH_MONITOR_AUTO_CHECK.description: Set to '1' to enable background scheduled checks

HEALTH_MONITOR_RETENTION_DAYS.description: Number of days to retain health check history

HEALTH_MONITOR_MAX_CONCURRENCY.description: Maximum concurrent scheduled and interactive server checks

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Optional GitHub token with Actions read access for private repositories and higher API rate limits

GITLAB_TOKEN.description: Optional GitLab token with read access to private projects, pipelines, jobs, and traces

HEALTH_MONITOR_GITLAB_BASE_URL_ALLOWLIST.description: Comma-separated self-hosted GitLab HTTPS origins allowed for monitoring

HEALTH_MONITOR_HTTP_TARGET_ALLOWLIST.description: Comma-separated private HTTP(S) origins allowed only in the full runtime profile
